_description: Headline ringing experiment: a fluid block settling to hydrostatic rest at dt=0.1. Mirrors the CG2000 settling-pool run. This is the default preset run by run_final_experiment.bat.

_doc.steps_vs_duration: give 'duration' (seconds) or 'steps'; duration wins via round(duration/dt)
_doc.analysis: consumed by the ringing post-processing, not by the headless run

name: final_experiment
